def apply_defaults(config, defaults):
    merged = {**defaults, **config}
    return merged


def normalize_records(records):
    return [
        {**r, "name": r["name"].strip().lower(), "email": r["email"].strip()}
        for r in records
    ]


def enrich_items(items, metadata):
    return [
        {**item, "source": metadata["source"], "timestamp": metadata["timestamp"]}
        for item in items
    ]
